title: Jamaican Pear Galette
description: A twist on the traditional pastry, this jamaican pear galette combines the sweetness of pears with the warmth of jamaican spices.

ingredients.name: jamaican spices (allspice, thyme, scotch bonnet pepper)

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced pears, jamaican spices, honey, almond extract, and flaky sea salt.
Spread the pear mixture evenly over the center of the pastry dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Dot the top of the galette with the melted unsalted butter.
Bake the galette for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the pears are tender.
Remove the galette from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
